ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "playerid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Whether the player is right-handed or left-handed */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Overall pick number in the draft */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* JSON array of previous teams the player has played for */,
  "contract_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player's current contract ends */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playerid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current manager */,
  "assistant_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current assistant coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_assistant_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "playerid" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season for the metrics */,
  "WAR" REAL /* Wins Above Replacement for the season */,
  "ERA" REAL /* Earned Run Average (for pitchers) */,
  "OBP" REAL /* On-Base Percentage */,
  "SLG" REAL /* Slugging Percentage */,
  "OPS" REAL /* On-Base Plus Slugging */,
  "FIP" REAL /* Fielding Independent Pitching (for pitchers) */,
  "WHIP" REAL /* Walks plus Hits per Innings Pitched (for pitchers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_playerid FOREIGN KEY ("playerid") REFERENCES players ("playerid")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "playerid" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season for the stats */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average for the season */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored in the season */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs hit in the season */,
  "RBIs" INTEGER /* Runs Batted In */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Number of innings pitched (for pitchers) */,
  "hits_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of hits allowed (for pitchers) */,
  "earned_runs" INTEGER /* Number of earned runs (for pitchers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_playerid FOREIGN KEY ("playerid") REFERENCES players ("playerid")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "playerid" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date from the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  "injury_location" TEXT /* Specific location of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_playerid FOREIGN KEY ("playerid") REFERENCES players ("playerid")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "contract_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the coach's contract starts */,
  "contract_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the coach's contract ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouts" (
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scout */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the scout */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the scout belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of scouting expertise */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of scouting experience */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the scout */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the scout */,
  "contract_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the scout's contract starts */,
  "contract_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the scout's contract ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Scout) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
